name: asc-marketing-manager
description: API-aware workflows for dry-running and syncing localized App Store Connect text metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Dry-run and sync localized App Store Connect metadata with API-aware safety.
interface.longDescription: ASC Marketing Manager gives Codex focused knowledge of the App Store Connect API for localized text metadata. It turns Google Sheets or desired-state JSON into a validated dry run, can create a missing editable app version when requested, and applies only explicitly reviewed changes for names, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, URLs, What's New, promotional text, and App Review fields.
defaultPrompt: Compare my localization sheet with App Store Connect before release.
Create a dry run for version 2.3 using my App Store copy sheet.
Set up an editable App Store version and sync reviewed metadata.
